hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$paths = @(); if ($env:APPDATA) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:APPDATA 'Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra') }; if ($env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME 'Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra') }; if ($HOME) { $paths += (Join-Path $HOME '.config/Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'); $paths += (Join-Path $HOME 'Library/Application Support/Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra') }; $pluginRoot = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path $pluginRoot 'skills/session-startup/scripts/session-cleanup-detector.ps1') }"

pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$paths = @(); if ($env:APPDATA) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:APPDATA 'Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra') }; if ($env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME) { $paths += (Join-Path $env:XDG_CONFIG_HOME 'Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra') }; if ($HOME) { $paths += (Join-Path $HOME '.config/Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra'); $paths += (Join-Path $HOME 'Library/Application Support/Code/agentPlugins/github.com/Grimblaz/agent-orchestra') }; $pluginRoot = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($pluginRoot) { & (Join-Path $pluginRoot 'skills/plugin-release-hygiene/scripts/plugin-release-hygiene-hook.ps1') }"
